## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress on content marketing efforts for Dgraph and plan next steps to improve results.](https://fathom.video/share/rydxjC4z5vwrxaQAz2QyZgJf5mzxytyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [39 articles published so far, driving 18% increase in impressions and 20% increase in clicks](https://fathom.video/share/rydxjC4z5vwrxaQAz2QyZgJf5mzxytyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Need to identify more juicy, high-volume keyword topics to target](https://fathom.video/share/rydxjC4z5vwrxaQAz2QyZgJf5mzxytyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Plan to have a structured brainstorming session with Dgraph team to ideate on pain points and topics](https://fathom.video/share/rydxjC4z5vwrxaQAz2QyZgJf5mzxytyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [Explore bringing on a technical resource to vet content accuracy and topic relevance](https://fathom.video/share/rydxjC4z5vwrxaQAz2QyZgJf5mzxytyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [Marcel to provide a draft social media post based on previous recording with Kevin](https://fathom.video/share/rydxjC4z5vwrxaQAz2QyZgJf5mzxytyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [39 articles published so far](https://fathom.video/share/rydxjC4z5vwrxaQAz2QyZgJf5mzxytyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [18% increase in impressions, 20% increase in clicks](https://fathom.video/share/rydxjC4z5vwrxaQAz2QyZgJf5mzxytyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [One article driving majority of traffic, others showing good signs](https://fathom.video/share/rydxjC4z5vwrxaQAz2QyZgJf5mzxytyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Need to identify more high-volume, relevant topics](https://fathom.video/share/rydxjC4z5vwrxaQAz2QyZgJf5mzxytyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)

### Ideating on New Topics

  - [Current topics not juicy/high-volume enough](https://fathom.video/share/rydxjC4z5vwrxaQAz2QyZgJf5mzxytyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [Need brainstorming session to identify user pain points and scenarios that lead to graph database need](https://fathom.video/share/rydxjC4z5vwrxaQAz2QyZgJf5mzxytyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
  - [Focus on "why Postgres sucks" type of topics](https://fathom.video/share/rydxjC4z5vwrxaQAz2QyZgJf5mzxytyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Leverage product/CEO insights on customer pain points](https://fathom.video/share/rydxjC4z5vwrxaQAz2QyZgJf5mzxytyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)

### Technical Resource

  - [Explore hiring a technical resource for vetting accuracy and relevance](https://fathom.video/share/rydxjC4z5vwrxaQAz2QyZgJf5mzxytyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [Someone with backend/graph database experience](https://fathom.video/share/rydxjC4z5vwrxaQAz2QyZgJf5mzxytyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [Marcel to look into profiles and costs](https://fathom.video/share/rydxjC4z5vwrxaQAz2QyZgJf5mzxytyQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
